full_text:
Kong Zhou (Gongxu) 孔伷 (公緒)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Kong Zhou (孔伷), styledGongxu (公緒), was born in Chenliu. Known for his eloquent way of speaking. He joined alliance against Dong Zhuo. Kong Zhou was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
